login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in to pick up where you left off.
login.providerMockedBody: No real OAuth is wired in this build.

suspended.title: Account suspended
suspended.body: Your account has been suspended by an administrator. Contact support if you think this is a mistake.

oauthErrors.invalid_or_expired_state: Your sign-in link expired. Please try again.
oauthErrors.state_mismatch: Couldn't verify the sign-in request. Please try again.
oauthErrors.missing_code_or_state: The provider didn't return a valid response.
oauthErrors.token_exchange_failed: Couldn't complete sign-in with the provider.
oauthErrors.profile_fetch_failed: Couldn't read your profile from the provider.
oauthErrors.provider_unavailable: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.
oauthErrors.session_error: Couldn't start your session. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account.
register.subtitle: Free to start. No card required.
register.name: Name
register.captchaWrong: Not aligned — try the new puzzle.
register.ipLimited: Too many accounts created from your network today. Please try again later.
register.verifySubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below.
register.codeSentBody: Check your inbox for a new code.

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset code.
forgot.checkInboxBody: If {{email}} matches an account, we sent a 6-digit code. It expires in 10 minutes.
forgot.resetSubtitle: Enter the code we sent to {{email}} and choose a new password.
forgot.resetSuccessBody: You can now sign in with your new password.

twofa.title: Two-factor verification
twofa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
twofa.invalid: That code didn’t work — try again

setup.title: Create your admin account
setup.subtitle: This is the first account on this Aurelia instance — it becomes the administrator.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information Aurelia collects, how it is used, and the choices you have. By using Aurelia you agree to the practices described here.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: We collect the account details you provide (your name and email) and the content you create in the app — your conversations, prompts, and any files you upload.

sections.heading: How we use your information
sections.body: We use your information to operate and secure the service, generate AI responses, keep your history across sessions, and improve reliability and quality.

sections.heading: AI model providers
sections.body: To generate responses, the content of your prompts and attachments may be sent to the third-party AI model providers configured by the administrator. Their handling of that data is governed by their own policies.

sections.heading: Storage and security
sections.body: Your data is stored on servers operated by this instance’s administrator and transmitted over encrypted connections. No method of storage or transmission is completely secure, but reasonable measures are taken to protect it.

sections.heading: Your choices and contact
sections.body: You can edit or delete your conversations at any time and delete your account from Settings, which removes the associated data. For any privacy question, contact the administrator of this instance.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of Aurelia. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to them.

sections.heading: Your account
sections.body: You are responsible for the activity under your account and for keeping your credentials secure. Provide accurate information when registering.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
sections.body: Do not use Aurelia for any unlawful, harmful, abusive, or infringing purpose, or attempt to disrupt or gain unauthorized access to the service.

sections.heading: Your content
sections.body: You retain ownership of the content you submit. You grant the service the limited rights needed to process and store it in order to provide features to you.

sections.heading: AI-generated output
sections.body: Responses are generated by AI models and may be inaccurate or incomplete. Do not rely on them as professional advice; verify important information independently.

sections.heading: Availability, changes, and termination
sections.body: The service is provided “as is” without warranties. Features and these Terms may change; continued use means you accept the changes. Accounts that violate these Terms may be suspended, and you may stop using the service at any time.
